'''Gilatter VIII''' or '''Gilatter Eight''' was a gas giant with red, yellow and orange gases and was close to [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]].

==History==
{{Quote|Gilatter Eight is where the Confederation meeting is going to take place. The election of your counterpart, their supreme military commander. And the launch point of their next fleet action.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Exile">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>}}
During the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] era, Gilatter VIII had been a favorite vacation spot, though the novelty wore off and the last resort closed a century before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], it was the site of a secret meeting of the [[Confederation]] which was itself a trap. The trap was somewhat successful, as it brought [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] onboard who intended to capture or kill all onboard.

Mines were placed to be used by the Confederation to use against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] fleet. Jacen warned the fleet and the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]] ensued.

Outside, both fleets fought, while inside, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] dueled [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]] [[Lumiya]] to a draw. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Alema Rar]] also fought to a draw.
